notes: Previously blocked (Wave 11) on a stale finding: Wave 9 research found no Easter entry in Syria's holiday list.

Unblocked 2026-07-14: verified via WebSearch/WebFetch that Presidential Decree No. 188/2025 (issued 2025-10-05) restored Easter (Western + Orthodox, separately) plus Christmas as official paid holidays, confirmed by a 2026-03-30 General Secretariat of the Presidency bulletin giving exact 2026 dates (April 5 Western, April 12 Orthodox).
country-hub-data.js Syria section updated in the same session to reflect the corrected holiday list.

This event tracks Western Easter (type: easter, easterOffset: 0) as the primary countdown; Orthodox Easter is explained in content but not a separate event page (mirrors this site's existing choice not to split Lebanon's dual Easter into two pages either).
